---
title: "Why this deck exists"
outcome: "Reader understands the scope and non-goals of the P1 review tool."
---

# Why this deck exists

The Stage-2 WHAT document exists to lock a slide's purpose before anyone
spends effort on visuals. One file, one slide, one outcome.

- Scope is small on purpose
- Outcome line is mandatory
- Anything longer is a smell

Without this discipline the Stage-3 HOW phase turns into a chat about
content instead of a chat about design.
